name: hovercard
title: Hovercard
description: A rich content preview disclosed on hover/focus of an inline trigger (the GitHub user-card pattern). Baseline is an <a> trigger paired with a hidden card region; hovercard.js layers hover-intent delay, focus support, and aria-describedby wiring so it stays keyboard- and screen-reader-accessible. A composed recipe — no custom element required to consume it.

cem.name: Hovercard
cem.description: Composed-API surface of the hovercard preset — a hover/focus content preview. Describes the authoring surface (#668), never the internal hovercard.js wiring. Rides the #653 CEM protocol.

attributes.name: aria-describedby
attributes.description: The trigger points at the id of the card region it discloses.

slots.description: Card body — arbitrary preview content (avatar, name, meta, actions).

x-webeverything.note: A composition, not a registered custom element — the CEM coexists with the plain-markup recipe (#652 Fork 1 API-descriptor layer).

files.content: @author Project Author @author Maintains the Web Everything standards constellation.
